description: This file controls the groups item modifiers for High Quality (Superior) item types. The game will randomly choose between one of these High Quality groups, if it is allowed for the item type. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: mod1code
columns.description: Controls the item properties that are added to the item Reference of properties.code or PropertyGroups.code

columns.name: mod1param
columns.description: The stat's "parameter" value associated with the related property (.mod#code). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field)

columns.name: mod1min
columns.description: The stat's "min" value to assign to the related property (.mod#code). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field)

columns.name: mod1max
columns.description: The stat's "max" value to assign to the related property (.mod#code). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field)

columns.name: mod2code
columns.description: Controls the item properties that are added to the item Reference of properties.code or PropertyGroups.code

columns.name: mod2param
columns.description: The stat's "parameter" value associated with the related property (.mod#code). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field)

columns.name: mod2min
columns.description: The stat's "min" value to assign to the related property (.mod#code). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field)

columns.name: mod2max
columns.description: The stat's "max" value to assign to the related property (.mod#code). Usage depends on the property function (See the properties.func# field)

columns.name: armor
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then allow this High Quality (Superior) modifier to be applied on both torso armor and helmet item types. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: weapon
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then allow this High Quality (Superior) modifier to be applied on melee weapon item types (except scepters, wands, and staves). If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: shield
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then allow this High Quality (Superior) modifier to be applied on shield item types. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: scepter
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then allow this High Quality (Superior) modifier to be applied on scepter item types. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: wand
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then allow this High Quality (Superior) modifier to be applied on wand item types. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: staff
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then allow this High Quality (Superior) modifier to be applied on staff item types. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: bow
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then allow this High Quality (Superior) modifier to be applied on bow or crossbow item types. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: boots
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then allow this High Quality (Superior) modifier to be applied on boots item types. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: gloves
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then allow this High Quality (Superior) modifier to be applied on gloves item types. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: belt
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then allow this High Quality (Superior) modifier to be applied on belt item types. If equals 0, then ignore this.
